content: Just pushed my first commit to the new project. Feels good to start fresh.
Why does CSS centering still trip me up after all these years?
Refactored the auth module today, deleted way more code than I wrote. Best kind of day.
Anyone else excited about the new React compiler? Game changer for performance.
TIL you can use structuredClone instead of JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()).
Shipping a small feature every day beats one giant release every month.
Debugging a race condition for three hours only to find a missing await. Classic.
Really enjoying how Mantine handles theming out of the box.
Weekend project: building a tiny Twitter clone just for fun. No backend yet, just local storage.
